trends.headline: North Korea rejects US cybercrime claims as 'absurd slander'
trends.summary: Pyongyang refutes allegations of hacking and crypto theft, even as a UN panel estimated billions stolen by North Korea-linked cyberattacks.

trends.headline: Iran war: Trump says reviewing new Tehran proposal with doubt
trends.summary: US President Donald Trump has said he "can't imagine" the proposal is acceptable. Tehran said the "ball is in the US' court" to choose whether to pursue diplomacy or confrontation. DW has more.

trends.headline: The clandestine network smuggling Starlink tech into Iran to beat internet blackout
trends.summary: Sahand tells the BBC World Service he sends satellite internet terminals into Iran to help show "the real picture".

trends.headline: Is there a 'standard' Indian body?
trends.summary: India recently published a survey to 'standardize' the Indian body sizes, so its manufacturers don't have to use the U.S. and E.U. sizes for a billion people. But is there a 'standard' Indian body?

trends.headline: RFID Jukebox with ESP32
trends.summary: Tech Talkies designed a functional RFID Jukebox using an ESP32.

trends.headline: Video of NYC police killing machete-wielding man at Grand Central station released
trends.summary: Body camera footage shows New York police fatally shooting a man armed with a machete after he injured three people at a Grand Central subway station.

trends.headline: Ukraine is hitting oil facilities deep inside Russia. Soaring fuel prices could blunt the impact
trends.summary: Ukrainian drone strikes on oil facilities deep inside Russia are sending smoke skyward and raising concerns that rising fuel costs could undercut their impact.

trends.headline: Drone kills 2 in Kherson minibus strike, as Russia claims front-line progress
trends.summary: A Russian drone strike on a minibus in Kherson killed two people, underscoring continued attacks on civilian areas as Moscow claims gains along the front line.

trends.headline: Israeli airstrikes on southern Lebanon kill 7 despite ceasefire
trends.summary: Deadly Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon have left at least seven people dead, raising tensions despite an existing ceasefire with Hezbollah.

trends.headline: Trellix Confirms Source Code Breach With Unauthorized Repository Access
trends.summary:
Cybersecurity company Trellix has announced that it suffered a breach that enabled unauthorized access to a "portion" of its source code.
It said it "recently identified" the compromise of its source code repository and that it began working with "leading forensic experts" to resolve the matter imme

trends.headline: Fifth Circuit blocks mailing of abortion pill nationwide
trends.summary: The FDA is currently conducting a review of mifepristone, one of the most commonly prescribed forms of medication abortion, especially via telehealth.
